textByHash.a769e9e16d69fa29a5fd690ee222599a044efdd2: Ver Sinhaza is home to the Theatre of Blood. Maybe they were just there as spectators?
textByHash.696c27e6b34697b1881d544957d552714edb4cfc: So they'd still need blood from one of us? We might be okay then. It's not like the vampyres name and number the tithes they take.
textByHash.5e50fe08aa2e08ea363220bb6834ed61eaa734f7: We'll have to leave. We should be able to sneak out of Meiyerditch using the same route you did.
textByHash.80d9d49c647ac6b24bc047c786b501b789e49e71: We can meet up with Veliaf and the rest of the Myreque in Burgh de Rott. Once we're all together, we can travel to Paterdomus and cross the Salve into Misthalin.
textByHash.5311498b39870c9e3c0069045f933cd6ab7585c6: All of the essentials are packed up and ready to go.
textByHash.cbbf662407e70479785e3e6f725ecec1d4ee6111: It's weakened! Let's finish it off!
textByHash.fafcacddc666436b466e51e1a212638d83627ec7: , we have an old hideout beneath Old Man Ral's house in southern Meiyerditch. Meet us there.
textByHash.fd04da0ade4677dcb7d8820a1dfbf257e879adfd: More would have died if not for you. Your magic weakened that thing. We would never have been able to kill it without that.
textByHash.5b197dde58981c59659f501b1dc11829df5d8f64: Actually, I think you might be wrong there.
textByHash.6cc177d1549b29e022c9b4a58d4aa326df80b042: Flaygian managed to translate some more of the haemalchemy book while you two were investigating Serafina.
textByHash.974b43a5573dd09fe83c507fcdb2f8fd8f2a84b2: We never got the chance to look over his new discoveries before the attack. However, I did recover his notes as we left.
textByHash.183417825b1c966cdfc38ab74e4eff9639f62678: Hello there. I have these notes for us to review. Come back when you have room for them and we'll get started.
textByHash.7b09d957ef46951b446797a52ad231e027f96b9b: Hello there. Here are the notes Flaygian made. Have a read through and let me know if you need any help.
textByHash.c6b44124637e12f9ff86b6de83b9e5981beb80e3: Do you need any help with Flaygian's notes?
textByHash.4bddc75b5f4f04b16dc301660ea6dd8b06a168d1: I imagine you'd know more about that than me. Weren't you the one who remade it?
textByHash.9efec27c70a8f43f8791dafec07f1baad4a69e17: Well I'm sure he still has it. You should ask him if you can have it back. Alternatively, you could always make another.
textByHash.47cf2cea72a54670edb22cfc0041c39e3f3c0388: Check the crates around here, we should have some chain lying around.
textByHash.159b40d390b40fd4f9d575e0d47183f302334fa9: Well we have some blessed silver sickles in storage here. You should check the crates. What kind of enchantment does it need?
textByHash.5f80065800c255506681fbb09363cd008f8377f5: Well you'll need to get an emerald and attach it to the sickle. You'll be needing a chisel to do that. Once you've attached the emerald, you should be able to enchant the sickle using an enchantment spell.
textByHash.1bcd779ea7d48279e345a2bce743a937d23bd368: Great work. You should let Safalaan know.
textByHash.d126153108a30d0c6965802c391e88abceced8c5: And for the first time, we have a weapon that could actually defeat him.
textByHash.21065ec074316bbf269d9d2bbce8b08d824025bb: Hello, player. You'd better get moving. Ranis will be starting his speech soon.
textByHash.d61344046696d6cc30423f25b644b6cc0d1c9bc4: Well I have made a few more. I suppose I could let you have one. I'll have to charge you though, some of this stuff isn't easy to get hold of.
textByHash.e6afb2ef084a3762d0dbbddc22b24706a7b0fa81: Here you go. Put it to good use
textByHash.328ef33f6ac862a6a9e48e3c21b6e0080f35bf76: I'm afraid you don't have enough room for it. Come back when you do.
textByHash.dfcbd1d5814dca478d1c56e671f3d5484a6ed5d9: I'll be here when you do.
textByHash.51e8d5ab594423101c42d2a3004561c47e07831a: Good to have you here, player.Everthing seems to feel more positive when you're around.
textByHash.e0acb212685d60d8aa933a44e5ce1cb4d3838a1d: Who are you? What are you doing here?
textByHash.bfd5636b4f1cf7f44c30f8521a2f1fa3676c3052: Oh, and I'm just supposed to believe you am I?
textByHash.d11198a703ff602b54d5d0787cc2a859de5a14fb: Veliaf? Is he still alive? Amazing! Well, you make a convincing story, so I guess I'll have to believe you, for now.
textByHash.5d53d05410e685a7cfcc0d3b99df74357609c1f0: So anyway, I'm Vertida, one of the Myreque here. What brings you to this miserable place?
textByHash.4caff05a11b9e7dadc78dada388f9e55e733d4e5: >Well, it seems like you've done that! I'll tell you what I'll do. I'll write you out a message to give to Veliaf as proof that the Sanguinesti order of the Myreque still exists.
textByHash.5913457920828aee3d0726657132db6699dfc1af: I'm the second in command of the Myreque here in Meiyerditch. The others are all out on missions right now.
textByHash.35483e2fb29745854512d2c50223f23862edbbc3: Not always. I was originally from Lumbridge, perhaps much like yourself. I ended up here when I was captured by the vampyres while exploring Mort Myre. That was a long time ago.
textByHash.7d5be98978d7a6b1d7aca85f0c418062b569ad98: I found Safalaan, the leader of this group. Together we escaped from Meiyerditch and formed the Myreque out in Mort Myre.
textByHash.e56456942b757fc50cf7f9692148e8ddcdaa7137: We eventually came back here though. We knew we couldn't leave the people here to the vampyres.
textByHash.58217c9d11ca253da986e1cdafa5f504f4c32c25: That's really up to you. That said, I imagine you'll probably want to get back to where you came from and deliver that message I gave you.
textByHash.90d265edb58304ceed5bb699b149646f6461039b: That's really up to you. Why are you here anyway?
textByHash.3f2fd716e6f8a528ba0c2d20f9bd0b24f87dcc67: Myreque prevail! What can I do for you?
textByHash.4801f9ec42e250979e916795de20f9636bf6aa5e: Well, I've been with them for years now. We have multiple groups in Morytania but I only really know about those of us based here.
textByHash.3094d15855f93ddd06b50a80cdaee0dd8a757812: To be honest, things haven't been great for us. Our leader, Safalaan, keeps us going. We'd be nowhere without him.
textByHash.e58f9123dc609063644c012a4f44b9fb0660790a: I'd like to help, I really would, but I can't leave the base right now. The others are all out on missions so someone needs to keep watch here.
textByHash.f5f400abdde529a0e5d6802210a7db3c0d6a1ef8: Myreque prevail. You should have a chat with Safalaan. He may be able to help you.
textByHash.72b055e411818898a31e7670fed89f0bd6617725: This is disastrous! Things seem to go from bad to worse! You will have to communicate this information to our leader, Safalaan. He needs to know as soon as possible.
textByHash.517b234723a37b4533cb9d16624f33bd37adba7b: He's out on a mission sketching Castle Drakan. He's taken the wall route so you'll need to do the same.
textByHash.7ca9a416952165f6102a4e2571aad299c0cc8542: There is a barricade that prevents further travel north. It's located under the wall. You'll need to search the wall southeast of the barricade to release the lock on the door.
textByHash.15c6dec471b05e7a1213c1db1e348cafe3d40d05: He's very distinctive. It shouldn't be a problem trying to find him if you know where to look, and you've got a good set of eyes on you!
textByHash.135bbd4eca976c40eb4fa18f46e5b0565cf330f5: Anyway, I need to head towards the wall myself now, so you can come with me. It'll be quicker than going back on your own.
textByHash.ae96cd3e9d373144ee8a70aa6107a39c1fc1ae78: I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.78ac944a7e922a8bf941d22256a74cdb1590e1ad: You need to report to our leader, Safalaan. He's out on a mission sketching Castle Drakan. He's taken the wall route so you'll need to do the same.
textByHash.37f9015301e0d99f51c09df465b04a8f7995d100: Ah. Glad to have you with us. Myreque prevail.
textByHash.804697d6305086296a348944143d750953591551: To be honest, I don't know. Ask me again if we're still alive after this meeting.
textByHash.067edeb422450f3593547d9b29468ad6f2e838f2: You'd have us become your scapegoats.
textByHash.c46c9e907584dde0b3ac86f7a7ba401a6ec6f352: Keep an eye on Safalaan. I don't like leaving him alone with that vampyre.
textByHash.3df416a9d0518317d0171b9ee68229f2dff0964a: I saw you head into that mausoleum with Safalaan and Vanescula. What's going on?
textByHash.ff0966eeda27f163c2abf5f414cc8992e1cb0317: Is he okay? That's quite the sudden discovery.
textByHash.1204362d7460f2951dc646e70efe8e88d56554a5: He's agreed to work with her, hasn't he?
textByHash.7f5fa0290eae6ce29bb50ed979b0bf824cc060fd: I know what he's like. I've known Safalaan longer than anyone. When Vanstrom attacked him and he lost his memory, I was the one that found him.
textByHash.2c3e18fcbf625049148f8512c295876e1b651c5e: Well, if Safalaan wants to work with Vanescula, then he has my support.
textByHash.16d3c2d52366321d95b21af82c19834c657654f4: I trust Safalaan. He's made some mistakes, sure. But he's a good leader and I know he won't have made this choice lightly. Tell him he has my support all the way on this.
textByHash.ecab03525332a0f419fde7ff1f83c9986d8d9a67: Have you spoken to the others about the plan?
textByHash.ad7bfb39369d129caee09f143bf976d06044e6f1: Well I'll let you get back to it then.
textByHash.c1abf57c20f4f24b8a102315f41ffbb5b8176902: We'll soon be doing battle with one of the most powerful beings in existence. How are you feeling?
textByHash.a88e6226fb3858b14cf780dae3cf840492845000: Surprisingly calm, to be honest. We may well die in this fight, but if we manage to defeat Drakan, it will be worth it.
textByHash.90b44c36207002e5705a33a4d47896cbc18bcf10: I hear you're meant to be bringing us some logs. Do you have them?
textByHash.eb877efd058a7aff305213b88406e007344a3348: I'll be here once you have them. We need eight in total.
textByHash.71a7f3f31170aa59f03da0094eb31047ef81b69b: Great. Could I have seven of them?
textByHash.2203421b6dd65b8e0c2206bf1778d2e64233ad2c: Right, we're going to be using these logs to make blisterwood sickles. That's what most of us will be using in the battle.
textByHash.cba26a9de5803f667539ce411f3ca9f3d4b95778: However, I think you'll be able to swap out the sickle on your flail for a blisterwood one.
textByHash.17fe685d424e972356e39f8ae0c26949b963e551: It should be very similar to how you made your emerald sickle. First, you'll want a blessed silver sickle. We have plenty in the crate over there.
textByHash.be2914986a5ed4ac984767644f49f94add19b830: You'll want to take your blessed sickle and use a chisel to embed a ruby in it. You'll need to get your own ruby I'm afraid.
textByHash.483d58cdefaad2030c565ffbf218fdb929262b37: Once that's done, you'll need to enchant the ruby sickle using a ruby enchant spell.
textByHash.15823d38463b2a13c45f0cf12b331f0684efeb50: Finally, you'll need to use a knife to combine your sickle with the blisterwood logs. That will give you a blisterwood sickle.
textByHash.9b936452c1c7ba865e117d768302f1ede66df30e: Exactly. If you need any help, just let me know.
textByHash.6068502d39af356644fb096d69c566c9c866a185: Well let me know when you're ready to hand them over.
textByHash.bc8ac6d0e32289921a169494587da38378095528: First you'll want to take a blessed silver sickle and use a chisel to embed a ruby in it. There's some blessed sickles in a crate here but you'll need to get your own ruby.
textByHash.05761ea7291a670c2d11c27be1cf489fcba647d4: Finally, you'll need to use a knife to combine your sickle with the blisterwood logs. That will give you a blisterwood sickle that you can attach to your flail.
